scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/ui run build && npm --prefix apps/demo run build
scripts.release:ui:check: npm --prefix packages/ui run verify && npm --prefix packages/ui run build && npm --workspace packages/ui publish --access public --dry-run
scripts.release:ui:publish: npm --prefix packages/ui run verify && npm --prefix packages/ui run build && npm --workspace packages/ui publish --access public
